text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh no, now I've done it...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My, my! What's wrong? Feeling down? Maybe you
need a little treat?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not that. I was doing some dance practice
on my own just now...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I got too into it and ended up tearing a hole
through the dance studio wall!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You did?! Wow! What happened? Did you punch
it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No... You know that dance with the kicking
moves? I was doing that, then bam! Leg went
right through!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've apologized, but as a princess, this is most
disgraceful!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, the legs I worked so hard to train have
betrayed me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it! The wall took some damage,
but it's not a bad thing to be strong! ☆ Let's eat
looots of food and cheer you up!
